summary: Comprehensive testing of UK Coffee Shop documentation website completed. Backend APIs fully functional with 100% success rate. Frontend UI working correctly with minor mobile menu interaction issue. Admin authentication and CRUD operations working perfectly. Map integration with Leaflet functioning well. Search, filter, and navigation features operational.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu toggle click timeout on tablet/mobile viewport

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints (21/21 tests passed)
Home page loading with hero section and shop listings
Search and filter functionality working correctly
Shop detail pages with ratings, reviews, and image galleries
Map view with Leaflet integration and interactive markers
Admin login with correct credentials validation
Admin dashboard with shop management interface
Admin CRUD operations (Add, Edit, Delete shop functionality)
Responsive design adapting to different viewport sizes
